doc_title: Reporting Items for Systematic Reviews — PRISMA 2020 Statement
label: fabricated
reason: The citation is real but the quoted sections on "Citation Verification" and "Common Errors" do not appear in the actual PRISMA 2020 statement.
response_turn1:
